title: Single Cell RNA-sequencing of Pancreatic Circulating Tumor Cells
author: Ben Wittner David Ting Ajay Shah David Miyamoto Brian Brannigan Kristina Xega Jordan Ciciliano Huili Zhu Olivia MacKenzie Julie Trautwein Mohammad Shahid Haley Ellis Na Qu Nabeel Bardeesy Miguel Rivera Ravi Kapur Sridhar Ramaswamy Toshi Shioda Mehmet Toner Shyamala Maheswaran Daniel Haber
content: E-GEOD-51372 Single Cell RNA-sequencing of Pancreatic Circulating Tumor Cells RNA-seq of coding RNA EFO EFO_0003738 Mus musculus Circulating Tumor Cells (CTCs) are shed from primary tumors into the bloodstream, mediating the hematogenous spread of cancer to distant organs.
